summary_en: UserBase initiates tender offer for all outstanding shares and warrants of Global Information at 1,680 yen/share and 144,200 yen per warrant. Minimum acceptance threshold 1,983,600 shares. Offer period May 21 - Jul 1, 2026 (30 business days). Target board recommends acceptance and full delisting intended.
title_en: Notice Regarding Commencement of Tender Offer for Shares and Warrants of Global Information, Inc. (Stock Code: 4171) by UserBase, Inc.
translation_en_brief: UserBase announced on May 20, 2026, the commencement of a public tender offer for all outstanding ordinary shares and warrants of Global Information (TSE Standard Market, code 4171) with the intent to make Global Information a wholly-owned subsidiary. The offer price is 1,680 yen per ordinary share and 144,200 yen per warrant (issued July 30, 2018). The tender period runs from May 21, 2026 through July 1, 2026 (30 business days). The minimum acceptance threshold is 1,983,600 shares; there is no upper limit. Global Information's board of directors has voted to recommend the offer to shareholders and warrant holders. UserBase currently owns no shares or warrants in the target company.
